title: Fehren's default edit
description: A edit of the minecraft default texture packs using the 1.13 textures and 1.14 textures completed with connected textures
body:
A edit of the minecraft default texture packs using the 1.13 textures and 1.14 textures completed with connected textures.
1.8.9 version will be released if this gets 50 downloads.
Also this requires continuity for connected textures but if u dont want connected textures you can use it without continuity or optifine
